5+ Years of Excellence
Our Story

More Than a Haircut. It's an Experience of a life time.

Fadeful Barber was born from a passion for precision and a love for the craft. Since 2023, we've built a space where men come not just to look sharp — but to feel confident, respected, and at home.

From the first clipper pass to the final mirror check, your satisfaction is my standard.

  • Certified and experienced barber
  • Premium products — only the best on your skin
  • Relaxed, welcoming atmosphere
  • Walk-ins welcome, appointments always recommended
  • Serving Ranfontein with pride
Book Your Session

What I Offer

Our Services

From a clean taper to a full grooming session — I got you covered.

🎨

Dye Cut

A full haircut paired with professional hair dye. Bold colour, clean finish — walk out looking completely fresh.

R80 / per session
✂️

Cut Without Dye

A precise, clean haircut with no colour treatment. Sharp lines, great shape — exactly what you need.

R65 / per session
💈

Trim

A quick tidy-up to keep your style looking fresh between full cuts. Edges, neckline, and shape maintained.

R15 / per session

The Work

Fresh Cuts, Every Time

Real work from my chair. The proof is in the fade.

✨

Real clients, real fades — straight from our chairs.
